title: DescribeExportTasksRequest
description: DescribeExportTasksRequest schema from Amazon Application Discovery Service API

exportIds.description: One or more unique identifiers used to query the status of an export request.

name.description: A single ExportFilter name. Supported filters — agentIds.

values.description: A single agent ID for a Discovery Agent. An agent ID can be found using the DescribeAgents action.

maxResults.description: The maximum number of volume results returned by DescribeExportTasks in paginated output.

nextToken.description: The nextToken value returned from a previous paginated DescribeExportTasks request.
